cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out who Bob is dancing with at the end of the dance. We have Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve as dancers, each with partners at the start: Alice with Lola, Bob with Karl, Claire with Patrick, Dave with Sam, and Eve with Helga. The problem says there are several partner switches throughout the song. Let me list them out step by step so I don't get confused. 1. Dave and Alice switch partners. 2. Eve and Alice switch partners. 3. Bob and Dave switch partners. 4. Bob and Eve switch partners. 5. Bob and Claire switch partners. I need to track each of these swaps and see what the final pairings are, especially focusing on who Bob ends up with. Let me go through each step carefully. Starting with the initial partners: - Alice → Lola - Bob → Karl - Claire
